free_text: Coulomb breakup of 7Li for nuclear astrophysics
Detect triton and alpha in coincidence.
- Solid angle of detector is 2.74 msr.(Pairs of the
breakup fragments emitted into the above solid angle
were momentum-analyzed according to their magnetic
rigidity and focused at different positions along
- Detector resolution: 218 keV for alpha 173 keV for
